title: cracca andongensis
intro: Cracca andongensis, also known as Desmodium andongensis, is a perennial plant species native to Angola, belonging to the Fabaceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which have been shown to aid in the treatment of various health issues. The health benefits of Cracca andongensis include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infused in oil to be used as a topical treatment or ingested as a medicinal remedy.
